caption: The video shows a screen recording of a computer terminal window running a server log. The interface is a dark-themed text editor with line numbers and a status bar at the bottom that reads "E-python3". The logs display a series of HTTP requests and server responses, with repeated entries showing requests for paths such as "/etc/passwd", "/wp-admin/index.php", and "/Horia/HTTP/1.0". Legible text in the logs includes timestamps like "[26/Oct/2020: 6:21:16 +0000]" and specific error messages such as "HTTP/1.1 404 Not Found" and "HTTP/1.1 403 Forbidden". The screen remains virtually static across the sequence, as the text content and layout do not change, indicating a paused or slowly scrolling log file being viewed within a development environment. No people or physical locations are visible, only the digital interface of the terminal.
